g.text: DK_IMU_SPI_SCK_TBD and DK_IMU_SPI_MOSI_TBD are DK-side series-option nets; the physical DK pins are proven, while R1/R2 values remain deferred pending signal-integrity testing.

g.desc: DK_IMU_SPI_SCK_TBD and DK_IMU_SPI_MOSI_TBD are DK-side series-option nets; the physical DK pins are proven, while R1/R2 values remain deferred pending signal-integrity testing.

g.text: INT1 is direct per finger. INT2 is deliberately not connected for v1. Two ground contacts are retained in the logical connector budget.

g.desc: INT1 is direct per finger. INT2 is deliberately not connected for v1. Two ground contacts are retained in the logical connector budget.
